#PhotoOfTheDay 📸

A U.S. Customs and Border Protection UH-60 Black Hawk helicopter flies over water while supporting security operations in advance of Super Bowl LIX near New Orleans, LA.

February 4, 2025. CBP Photo by Glenn Fawcett

#CBP 
#Photography https://t.co/szSUH2poju

tweets.text:
In just 48 hours, Border Patrol agents in San Diego Sector made two major drug busts. One resulting in over 142lbs of cocaine and the other with over 18lbs of fentanyl. A total seizure with an estimated street value of over $1.1M!

Read More ➡️ https://t.co/umJJOpcgyh https://t.co/hnqIeil1kD

tweets.text:
One stop.
One seizure.
$1M+ in narcotics off the streets.

Over the weekend, @CBPSouthTexas officers intercepted 64 packages of meth, weighing 141lbs, hidden in a vehicle. We seized the drugs and the vehicle. @HSI_HQ initiated an investigation.  

➡️ https://t.co/yUErkamH7v https://t.co/x1W5inRugF

tweets.text:
Through diligent enforcement, tunnels have been found both on the northern and southern borders. Border Patrol agents from the San Diego Sector Tunnel Interdiction Group provide insights on stopping illicit drug and human trafficking.

Watch Here ➡️ https://t.co/KoHM4fmPPE

tweets.text:
#TravelTip ✈️

Already have Global Entry?  Our Global Entry Mobile App changes everything! 🤯 The app allows you to get processed, vetted, and share your admission status with a @CBP officer, streamlining your travel experience.

More 👉 https://t.co/11z3Dy0Sf6 https://t.co/Xr9DTMWg2C

tweets.text:
Planning international travel? 

Many countries require six months of passport validity to enter, so @TravelGov recommends applying 6-9 months ahead of expiration date or travel. 

Learn more about your destination at https://t.co/Wn7USlnFAr. https://t.co/UDo8WkG9CI

tweets.text:
🐝In Mexico, a woman was found unresponsive in her yard due to an allergic reaction from wasps and rushed to a @CBPArizona port of entry for medical attention. CBP EMTs quickly began CPR until EMS arrived to provide additional medical care. 🚑

➡️ https://t.co/ZksBfT4tS7 https://t.co/IvRrLYbIk6

tweets.text:
#NationalStrawberryDay 🍓🍓🍓🍓🍓

THIS IS BERRY BAD! In 2022 CBP officers encountered a shipment described as strawberry puree from Mexico. What they found wasn't so sweet: nearly 1,761lbs of meth with an estimated street value of $35M! 

Read More ➡️ https://t.co/WGe9PK9U6G https://t.co/JIguhx7qRV

tweets.text:
Scam callers are impersonating CBP employees and requesting payment or personal information from residents. Note that CBP does NOT solicit payment by phone. If you receive one of these calls, hang up and report the call to the @FTC.

More about the scam: https://t.co/EW8nb0r477 https://t.co/X9ZJgPWLyp
tweets.text_resolved:

tweets.text:
#ICYMI Don't be tricked! Last month, CBP officers in Cincinnati seized over $1.4M in counterfeit Super Bowl LIX merchandise and memorabilia. Buying these items supports criminal organizations and defrauds legitimate American businesses.
 
➡️ https://t.co/bFh4x5nXDu https://t.co/5ZHTebrl28

tweets.text:
CBP Trusted Traveler Programs include NEXUS, SENTRI, and Global Entry.  On October 1, 2024, fees for all of these programs changed to $120USD, increasing the price for NEXUS and Global Entry members. 

Learn more: https://t.co/VUa479qUKP https://t.co/P2Rr2mrK5B
